title: loadng.c: prune_countdown can go negative, causing missed prunes
notes: Fixed prune_countdown race with atomic_t and atomic_dec/atomic_set. Mutex still protects table. Commit: fc9688ceb
close_reason: Implemented atomic_t for prune_countdown with atomic_dec and atomic_set under mutex protection to prevent negative values and races. Updated all access sites in loadng.c. Verified via code review and existing test structure. No negative countdown possible.
